name: Demi-Human Brothel
description:
The Demi-Human Brothel, where all of your demi-human sexual fantasies come true! Want a fox-girl? A dog-boy? A lamia? Maybe you want a threesome with a pair of gorgeous catgirls? Nothing is too exotic in Madam Zarina’s establishment! Or perhaps, just perhaps, you are a demi-human looking to work in the brothel (sorry humans, the law still lags behind here)? Enjoy yourself and have fun!

You should be able to be anything. Unless you want to work there, in which case humans need not apply!

Note, I’m still playing with the RPG/Open World scenarios. If there’s something you’d like to see, feel free to send a request via Reddit (see my profile page for the link).

Image from AI
creator: KitKat73
